title: Masterpoint Stack Config schema. Version 1.0. https://masterpoint.io
description: Schema for Masterpoint's spacelift-automation stack configuration files. This is used to override stack configurations for the https://github.com/masterpointio/terraform-spacelift-automation module.

automation_settings.description: Settings that control the automation behavior of the stack

default_tf_workspace_enabled.description: Whether to use the default terraform workspace

tfvars_enabled.description: Whether to enable tfvars file loading

stack_settings.description: Core stack settings, these overwrite the defaults set in the spacelift-automation module

role_attachment_role_slug.description: Role to attach to this stack. Setting this creates a spacelift_role_attachment resource for the stack. Accepts: built-in slugs ('space-admin', 'space-writer', 'space-reader'), slugs of pre-existing custom roles, or a key from var.managed_roles to reference a role created by this module. Overrides the module-level var.role_attachment.role_slug for this stack.

role_attachment_space_id.description: ID of the space in which the role attachment is created. Defaults to the stack's own space. Set to a different space ID for cross-space access.

additional_project_globs.description: Additional file patterns to trigger stack operations

after_run.description: Commands to run after run (aka `finally` hook).

autoretry.description: Flag to enable/disable automatically rerun proposed runs (PR plans) that have become out of date after a tracked run applies changes to the stack's state. Only supported with private worker pools. Docs: https://docs.spacelift.io/concepts/stack/stack-settings#autoretry

enable_well_known_secret_masking.description: Whether to enable masking of well-known secrets

git_sparse_checkout_paths.description: List of paths used for Git sparse checkout. When set, only the specified paths are fetched from the repository during a run.

github_action_deploy.description: Whether to enable GitHub Action deployment

labels.description: Custom labels for the stack, these merge with the default labels set in the spacelift-automation module

manage_state.description: Whether Spacelift should manage the state

protect_from_deletion.description: Whether to protect the stack from deletion

space_name.description: Spacelift space name, this will be translated to a space_id. Mutually exclusive with space_id

terraform_version.description: OpenTofu/Terraform version to use. Defaults to the latest available version.

worker_pool_name.description: Worker pool name, this will be translated to a worker_pool_id. Mutually exclusive with worker_pool_id

aws_integration_id.description: AWS integration ID to attach for both read and write operations. Override per-side with aws_integration_read_id / aws_integration_write_id.

aws_integration_name.description: AWS integration name to attach for both read and write operations, resolved to an ID. Mutually exclusive with aws_integration_id.

aws_integration_read_id.description: AWS integration ID for the read attachment only. Overrides aws_integration_id on the read side.

aws_integration_read_name.description: AWS integration name for the read attachment only, resolved to an ID. Mutually exclusive with aws_integration_read_id.

aws_integration_write_id.description: AWS integration ID for the write attachment only. Overrides aws_integration_id on the write side.

aws_integration_write_name.description: AWS integration name for the write attachment only, resolved to an ID. Mutually exclusive with aws_integration_write_id.

drift_detection_ignore_state.description: Whether to ignore state in drift detection

destructor_enabled.description: Whether to enable the stack destructor

destructor_deactivated.description: Whether to deactivate the stack destructor when enabled
